creator: natbsd@instinctive.eu
text:
Version 1.4 has been released by upstream (which happens to be myself).

  * Fix a bug in rendering nested block lists
  * Fix build with GCC 6 and other minor warnings
  * Build a static library too
  * Significantly improve documentation
  * Improvement of mkd2man
  * Add an amalgamation (C sources to include directly in a project)
    (not included in the port though)

I don't remember what should be provided these days to persuade committers that the patch is good. I have poudriere logs, building on an amd64 10.3-RELEASE host with an amd64 10.1-RELEASE building jail.

Please let me know if there is something more I can do to help make the workflow smoother, I have at least one more maintainer update (on another port) to push soonish.
